name: Kaaterskill Falls
notes: Two-tiered falls on Cascade Creek. Location = Laurel House Rd / Scutt Rd trailhead parking.

name: Mount Greylock
notes: Highest point in Massachusetts. Location = Visitor Center / trailhead parking; summit road also open.

name: Storm King Mountain
notes: Hudson Highlands ridge hike with river views. NOT the art center. Location = Rt 9W Stillman Spring trailhead pull-off.
